notes: FRAGMENTATION TEST (harder): 4 policies with data spread across THREE sections. Coverage Summary has carrier/number/dates. Coverage Detail has per-policy limits keyed by policy number. Additional Insureds Schedule lists parties keyed by policy number — and the same party can appear on multiple policies. Each policy's additional_insureds list must be built by collecting all mentions that reference that policy_number. This tests multi-section entity reconciliation where the 'join key' is the policy number referenced in different sections with different structure. Also tests that additional_insureds only list parties actually referenced, not all parties in the document. All data fictitious.
